engines_involved.role: primary — enriches CVE with NVD CVSS, EPSS probability, and CISA KEV status
engines_involved.status: IMPLEMENTED (cve_enrichment.py confirmed on disk, enrich_cve at line 134)

trigger_sources: VulnScanEngine after completing a scan and discovering CVEs in findings
SBOMExportEngine when SBOM components match known CVEs
Legacy EventBus: EventType.CVE_DISCOVERED is registered — engines using legacy bus are covered
Any engine calling event_bus.emit(CVE_DISCOVERED, cve_id=...) or event_bus.emit(CVE_DISCOVERED, entity_id=...)

current_state.summary: Single-engine flow with an early-exit guard. The handler checks cve_id first from 'cve_id' key, falling back to 'entity_id'. If the value is missing or does not start with 'CVE-', the handler returns immediately without calling anything. This is the only subscriber with a pre-call validation guard. CVEEnrichmentService.enrich_cve() makes real HTTP calls to NVD API and EPSS API with caching (use_cache=True).
current_state.cve_id_resolution: event_data.get('cve_id') or event_data.get('entity_id', '') — supports both field names.
current_state.prefix_guard: Rejects anything not starting with 'CVE-' — prevents malformed IDs from hitting external APIs.
current_state.cache: use_cache=True means repeated CVE_DISCOVERED events for the same CVE do not generate redundant API calls.
current_state.legacy_bus: This is one of only 3 event types wired to the legacy EventBus (along with THREAT_DETECTED and FINDING_CREATED).

what_works: cve_id validation guard (must start with 'CVE-') correctly prevents malformed IDs from reaching external APIs.
Dual field resolution (cve_id OR entity_id) covers different event payload conventions.
use_cache=True prevents redundant NVD/EPSS API calls for the same CVE.
Legacy EventBus is registered — the most complete bus coverage of all 9 flows.
_safe_call wraps the enrichment call so API failures do not propagate.
what_doesnt: No downstream chain — after enrichment, no FINDING_CREATED or RISK_ASSESSED event is emitted even if the enriched CVE has CVSS >= 9.0 or is in CISA KEV.
Enrichment result is not stored back to the originating engine — VulnScanEngine that emitted CVE_DISCOVERED never learns the EPSS score or KEV status unless it calls the CVE API itself.
No THREAT_DETECTED emission for KEV-listed CVEs — a CVE that is actively exploited in the wild (KEV=true) should trigger the full threat detection chain but does not.
No org_id is used — CVEEnrichmentService.enrich_cve() is a stateless lookup but the enrichment result is not scoped or stored per-org.
No deduplication notification — if enrichment fails (API down), there is no retry queue and no signal to the originating engine.
VulnPrioritizationEngine is not notified after enrichment — EPSS and KEV data that should drive remediation prioritisation is silently discarded.
No test in Beast Mode suite specifically tests on_cve_discovered() with a mock CVEEnrichmentService.
acceptance_criteria: AC1: Given CVE_DISCOVERED with cve_id='CVE-2024-1234', CVEEnrichmentService.enrich_cve('CVE-2024-1234', use_cache=True) is called exactly once.
AC2: Given CVE_DISCOVERED with entity_id='CVE-2024-5678' and no cve_id key, enrichment is called with 'CVE-2024-5678'.
AC3: Given CVE_DISCOVERED with cve_id='GHSA-xxxx' (no 'CVE-' prefix), the handler must return immediately without calling CVEEnrichmentService.
AC4: Given CVE_DISCOVERED with cve_id='' (empty), the handler must return immediately without calling CVEEnrichmentService.
AC5: When enrichment returns kev_listed=true (CISA KEV), a THREAT_DETECTED event must be emitted with severity='critical' so the full threat detection chain fires.
AC6: When enrichment returns cvss_score >= 9.0, a FINDING_CREATED event must be emitted with severity='critical' so a vuln workflow ticket is auto-created.
AC7: The enriched CVE data (CVSS, EPSS, KEV status) must be pushed back to VulnPrioritizationEngine so it can recompute remediation priority.
AC8: A pytest test mocks CVEEnrichmentService and verifies: valid CVE triggers enrichment, invalid prefix skips, KEV=true triggers THREAT_DETECTED emission.
AC9: API failure in CVEEnrichmentService must be logged at WARNING level with the cve_id; a retry token must be queued for background retry.
